Credit Only Granted for: EDCP742 or EDCP789K.

Formerly: EDCP789K.

EDCP743 Developmental Psychopathology (3 Credits)

Explore psychopathology from a developmental perspective and with an emphasis on affective bases of behavior

Restriction: Must be in Counseling and Personnel Services (Doctoral) program; or permission of instructor.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCP789Q or EDCP743.
